rationale: The citing paper’s note explicitly states it “updates prior evidence on JMR’s cross-domain diversity discussed by … Johnson (2006),” indicating the cited work is a direct antecedent for the paper’s framing of journal/domain integration. The DOI-level matched reference (10.1509/jmkr.43.3.337) confirms this is that Johnson 2006 source, so this is not a clearly incidental mention.
